visualizerParams.title: Optimizing Byte Allocation Loops
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The current `allocation_num` function uses a standard `for` loop. Refactor it to use a more concise approach like a list comprehension, ensuring the special handling for the last partition is preserved.

solution.explanation: Refactoring to a list comprehension makes the code more compact and readable, while maintaining the same logic for calculating the start and end of each byte range, including the final partition.
